title: My HCI Service - API Timeout
summary: HCI API service is timing out. Usually caused by database overload or network partition.
steps: Check API pod logs for timeout error messages
Verify database connectivity from the pod
Check active database connections and query latency
Look for recent spikes in API request rate
Review if a deployment happened in the last 30 minutes
causes: Database query slow due to missing index
Network latency spike between app and DB
